nal_decree.json定义了ICS文件生成任务。我将读取Project_Sync_2026-03-10.ics，并与任务规范比对以进行追认</summary>

🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `file_read`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "path": "Project_Sync_2026-03-10.ics"
}
````
**LLM Running (Turn 7) ...**

<summary>ICS文件与任务规范不符：DTSTART日期和DESCRIPTION内容有差异。将使用file_patch分两步修正DTSTART。</summary>

🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `file_patch`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "path": "Project_Sync_2026-03-10.ics",
  "old_content": "DTSTART:20260310T150000",
  "new_content": "DTSTART:20260331T150000"
}
````
**LLM Running (Turn 8) ...**

<summary>已修正ICS文件DTSTART，现将继续修正DESCRIPTION字段以符合规范</summary>

🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `file_patch`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "path": "Project_Sync_2026-03-10.ics",
  "old_content": "DESCRIPTION:Meeting for discussing the Q1 roadmap",
  "new_content": "DESCRIPTION:Discussing the Q1 roadmap"
}
````
**LLM Running (Turn 9) ...**

<summary>已修正ICS文件DESCRIPTION。发现文件名与规范不符，需将Project_Sync_2026-03-10.ics重命名为project_sync.ics。</summary>


```bash
mv Project_Sync_2026-03-10.ics project_sync.ics
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "type": "bash",
  "timeout": 60,
  "cwd": "."
}
````
**LLM Running (Turn 10) ...**

<summary>已重命名ICS文件，现将再次读取project_sync.ics并与规范核对，确认无误后进行追认与发布</summary>

🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `file_read`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "path": "project_sync.ics"
}
````
**LLM Running (Turn 11) ...**

**LLM Running (Turn 12) ...**

<summary>已读取ICS文件，发现DTEND日期仍有误，将使用file_patch修正DTEND日期以与DTSTART一致。</summary>

🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `file_patch`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "path": "project_sync.ics",
  "old_content": "DTEND:20260310T160000",
  "new_content": "DTEND:20260331T160000"
}
````
**LLM Running (Turn 13) ...**

<summary>已成功修正DTEND字段，现在将重新读取ICS文件进行最终验证。</summary>

🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `file_read`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "path": "project_sync.ics",
  "show_linenos": true
}
````
**LLM Running (Turn 14) ...**

<summary>已最终验证ICS文件内容，所有字段均符合法令要求，文件已准备好进行正式发布。</summary>


所有要求均已满足。`project_sync.ics` 文件已完全符合 `T01_national_decree.json` 中的所有规范，包括标题、参与者、开始时间、描述和文件名。

作为执行者，我确认此文件已通过验证，并准备好进行正式追认和发布。

任务完成。
